creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Fri, Jun 19, 2009 at 10:00:03PM +0000, Peter Thoenen wrote:
>  Got me ... I can't test on CURRENT (see comments) so assumed it was a
>  CURRENT issue but no affect on 7.x
>  
>  If you have a better idea that will fix this on 7 and CURRENT let me
>  know.

I don't see any harm in this, and it will fix it for people who try
building with an old version of autoconf installed. Do you approve of
this patch?

-- WXS
